hypothesis: A calibrated composite metric that linearly combines Earth Mover’s Distance of density, Kullback–Leibler divergence of space-group frequencies, and the fraction of sub-0.5 Å interatomic-distance violations will predict a generative model’s SUN score on 1,024 generated structures within ±5 percentage points using no more than 64 DFT relaxations for calibration, achieving at least 2× lower mean absolute error than latent Fréchet distance or any single-property EMD on both MP and OQMD.
